title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd explodes with excited cheers for
Mihono Bourbon at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Rice Shower some advice on how to keep
focused even when the crowd isn't on her side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to catch up to Mihono Bourbon, she
turns her full attention to the race.
